executive_summary: The Imagine Team possesses premium experiential design capabilities but suffers from fragmented digital execution. With 78% opportunity score, immediate wins include consolidating social presence, clarifying value proposition, and launching content marketing. This plan transforms scattered digital assets into cohesive lead generation system targeting IP owners and entertainment venues.

objectives.objective: Increase qualified leads from digital channels
Consolidate and grow social media presence

primary.description: IP owners and entertainment companies seeking traveling exhibition partners
primary.demographics: C-suite executives, marketing directors at major studios, theme parks, museums. Age 35-55, $150K+ income
primary.psychographics: ROI-focused, risk-averse, seeking proven partners with measurable results. Value premium positioning and full-service delivery

secondary.description: Museum directors and venue operators planning immersive experiences
secondary.demographics: Cultural institution leaders, venue managers. Age 40-60, education-focused backgrounds
secondary.psychographics: Mission-driven, budget-conscious, seeking educational impact alongside revenue generation

content_pillars.name: Behind the Magic
content_pillars.description: Behind-the-scenes content showing exhibition creation process, leveraging existing Harry Potter exhibition success

content_pillars.name: ROI & Results
content_pillars.description: Data-driven content showcasing measurable outcomes from exhibitions and experiential campaigns
example_posts: Visitor engagement increased 340% with interactive elements
Case study: How we doubled museum attendance

content_pillars.name: Industry Insights
content_pillars.description: Thought leadership content on experiential marketing trends and best practices
example_posts: Why traditional marketing fails for IP-based experiences

content_pillars.name: Client Spotlights
content_pillars.description: Success stories and case studies featuring major brand partnerships
example_posts: How we brought Harry Potter magic to 500K+ visitors

phase_1_foundation.focus: Digital infrastructure optimization and messaging clarity

tasks.task: Redesign homepage hero section with clear value proposition
tasks.deliverable: New homepage with 5-second clarity test results

tasks.task: Create lead magnets: Exhibition ROI Calculator and Design Checklist
Audit and consolidate social media handles
tasks.deliverable: Social media strategy document with handle recommendations

tasks.task: Set up conversion tracking and analytics
tasks.deliverable: Google Analytics 4 and Facebook Pixel implementation

tasks.task: Create brand guidelines for digital consistency
tasks.deliverable: Digital brand guide with color codes, fonts, and usage rules

phase_2_launch.focus: Content creation and social media optimization

tasks.task: Create and publish 4 case study blog posts
tasks.deliverable: SEO-optimized blog posts targeting key industry terms

tasks.task: Launch email nurture sequence for leads

tasks.deliverable: 8 short-form videos showcasing exhibition creation process
Specific lead magnet CTAs replacing generic contact forms

phase_3_scale.focus: Paid media launch and performance optimization

tasks.deliverable: 3 ad sets targeting IP owners with $2,000 monthly budget
4 long-form case study videos for YouTube and LinkedIn
HubSpot or Salesforce integration with lead qualification criteria
Facebook and Google retargeting ads for website visitors
Performance report with recommendations for Q2 strategy

paid_media_strategy.targeting_approach: Account-based marketing targeting specific entertainment companies, IP owners, and museum networks with custom audiences and lookalike modeling

competitive_advantages: Proven track record with major IP partnerships (Harry Potter, Universal, MGM)
Full-service capabilities from concept to operations
Existing high-engagement content on @harrypotter_exhibition to leverage
Premium positioning in growing experiential marketing sector

risks_and_mitigation.mitigation: Focus on ROI-driven messaging and smaller-scale pilot programs

risks_and_mitigation.risk: Fragmented brand perception from multiple social handles
risks_and_mitigation.mitigation: Immediate consolidation strategy with clear cross-promotion plan

risks_and_mitigation.risk: Long sales cycles in entertainment industry
risks_and_mitigation.mitigation: Implement nurture sequences and thought leadership content for extended engagement

investment_summary.expected_roi_timeline: Break-even at 60 days, 3x ROI by month 6 based on average client value of $250K+
